zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Clyvedon於1347年出生在英國薩默塞特牛頓 聖 勒時，她的父親John de Clyvedon28歲，母親Elizabeth Douglas22歲。她於大約1368年與Sir John de St Lo在英國薩默塞特牛頓 聖 勒結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1412年1月5日在英國薩默塞特巴斯享年65歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特巴斯。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Clyvedon was born in 1347, in Newton St Loe, Somerset, England, her father, John de Clyvedon, was 28 and her mother, Elizabeth Douglas, was 22. She married Sir John de St Lo about 1368, in Newton St Loe, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 5 January 1412, in Bath, Somerset, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in Bath, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Clyvedon est née en 1347, à Newton St Loe, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, John de Clyvedon, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Douglas, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de St Lo environ 1368, à Newton St Loe, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 5 janvier 1412, à Bath, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Bath, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Clyvedon 1347 in Newton St Loe, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Clyvedon 28 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Douglas 22. Sie hat um 1368 in Newton St Loe, Somerset, England Sir John de St Lo geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 5. Januar 1412 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Bath, Somerset, England und wurde in Bath, Somerset, England begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Clyvedon(이)가 1347년 영국 서머세트 뉴턴 스트 로이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Clyvedon(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Douglas(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1368년 영국 서머세트 뉴턴 스트 로이에서 Sir John de St Lo(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1412년 1월 5일 영국 서머세트 바스에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 바스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Clyvedon nasceu em 1347, em Newton St Loe, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Clyvedon, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Douglas, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John de St Lo aproximadamente 1368, em Newton St Loe, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 5 de janeiro de 1412, em Bath, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Bath, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Clyvedon родилась в 1347 г. в местности нютон ст ло, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Clyvedon было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Douglas, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de St Lo около 1368 г. в местности нютон ст ло, сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 5 января 1412 г. в местности бат, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности бат, сомирсет, Англия.
